summary: Tested Document Management System for Dichiarazioni dei Redditi. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified - admin document tab with PDF/ZIP download, client document archive, upload functionality.

minor.issue: Rate limit of 5 per minute can cause 429 errors during rapid testing

critical_code_review_comments: Document upload API working correctly for both client and admin
PDF generation with reportlab working - generates proper PDF with all declaration sections
ZIP download includes PDF riepilogo + all attachments in 'allegati/' folder
Message with attachment API working - supports optional file attachment
Integration request changes status to 'documentazione_incompleta' and increments pending_integration_requests
Status change with notification API working - push/email may fail silently if not configured
Client can only upload in 'bozza' or 'documentazione_incompleta' status
Invalid file types (.exe) correctly rejected with 400 error
Admin PDF/ZIP endpoints correctly forbidden for client role (403)
seed_data_creation: Test documents uploaded during testing: test_doc_iter42.pdf, admin_doc_iter42.pdf, message_attachment.pdf, integration.pdf
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document management system fully tested. Key APIs: POST /api/declarations/v2/declarations/{id}/documents (upload), GET /api/declarations/v2/declarations/{id}/documents (list), DELETE /api/declarations/v2/declarations/{id}/documents/{doc_id} (delete), GET /api/declarations/v2/admin/declarations/{id}/pdf (PDF download), GET /api/declarations/v2/admin/declarations/{id}/zip (ZIP download), POST /api/declarations/v2/declarations/{id}/messages/with-attachment (message with file), PUT /api/declarations/v2/admin/declarations/{id}/status-notify (status change with notification). Push/Email notifications may fail silently if Brevo/Push tokens not configured.

document_upload_client.notes: Client can upload PDF/JPG/PNG files up to 10MB in bozza/documentazione_incompleta status

document_upload_admin.notes: Admin can upload documents regardless of declaration status

document_list.notes: Returns list of documents with id, filename, file_size, mime_type, category, uploaded_by info

document_download.notes: Single document download with proper Content-Disposition header

document_delete.notes: Admin can delete any document, client can delete only in bozza status

pdf_riepilogativo_download.notes: Generates PDF with all declaration sections using reportlab

zip_completo_download.notes: ZIP contains riepilogo_dichiarazione.pdf + allegati/ folder with all attachments

pdf_forbidden_for_client.notes: Client gets 403 when trying to access admin PDF endpoint

message_with_attachment.notes: Admin can send message with optional file attachment

integration_request.notes: Integration request changes status to documentazione_incompleta

message_without_attachment.notes: Message can be sent without file attachment

status_change_with_notification.notes: Status change API works, push/email notifications may fail silently

frontend_admin_documents_tab.notes: Shows Download Pratica section with PDF Riepilogo and ZIP Completo buttons, upload area, document list with preview/download/delete

frontend_client_documents.notes: Shows Archivio Documenti with folder organization, Ultimi Documenti with recent uploads
